message:
fix(core): add UTF-8 char boundary checks and escape special chars in string handling

Harden string operations across 7 modules to prevent panics on multi-byte
UTF-8 sequences and injection via unescaped special characters:

command_guard.rs:
- Escape backslash, single quote, carriage return, and null bytes in
  Lua string interpolation contexts to prevent shell injection

recorder_export.rs, recorder_query.rs:
- Add is_char_boundary() checks before truncating strings at fixed byte
  offsets, preventing panic on multi-byte UTF-8 codepoints at boundaries

setup.rs:
- Handle CRLF vs LF line endings correctly in config file parsing
- Mask text by character count instead of byte count for consistent
  redaction of non-ASCII content

browser/anthropic_auth.rs, google_auth.rs, openai_device.rs:
- Add char boundary safety when truncating auth tokens and URLs for
  logging, preventing potential panic in tracing macros

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
